##  ScalableQuantum-Safe Security
KETS is powering the future of cybersecurity with scalable, chip-based quantum security solutions – such as Quantum Key Distribution (QKD) and Quantum Random Number Generators (QRNG).
Ultra-secure, compact, and energy efficient, KETS’ range of full-system and sub-system products are built to scale – ready to protect billions of devices across defense, finance, critical infrastructure, and telecoms against emerging threats like quantum computing and AI.
[Our Approach](https://kets-quantum.com/our-vision/)
##  OurTechnologies

#### Quantum Key Distribution
QKD securely distributes cryptographic keys using quantum mechanics, ensuring security based on physical laws.
QKD (Quantum Key Distribution) is a method for securely distributing cryptographic keys using the principles of quantum mechanics. The main advantage of QKD is that it provides a level of security that is based on the laws of physics, rather than computational complexity. This makes it an attractive solution for applications where high security is critical.
[Read More](https://kets-quantum.com/)
[Learn More about QKD](https://kets-quantum.com/quantum-key-distribution/)

#### Quantum RNG
Generates truly unpredictable numbers using quantum mechanics for unmatched security and randomness in applications.
QRNG (Quantum Random Number Generator) is a device that generates truly random numbers using the principles of quantum mechanics. The random numbers generated by QRNGs are truly unpredictable and cannot be replicated, making them valuable for applications that require high levels of randomness and security.
[Read More](https://kets-quantum.com/)
[Learn More about QRNG](https://kets-quantum.com/quantum-rng/)
##  KETS Kore -Use Cases
![](https://kets-quantum.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/09/satelliteimage.png)
## Hardening Satellite Communications
Safeguard global communications with satellites and high altitude pseudo-satellites, connecting the hardest to reach locations and platforms.
![](https://kets-quantum.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/09/telecomsimage2.png)
## Securing Control Planes
Our encryption algorithms (TLS, IPsec, MACsec, and PQC) require a quantum entropy source to seed them.
![](https://kets-quantum.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/09/navalimage.png)
## Internal Battleship Network
Securing the internal network of modern naval vessels from intrusion.
[Find out more](https://kets-quantum.com/kets-kore/#koreuse)
##  KETS QKD -Use Cases
![](https://kets-quantum.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/09/telecomsimage1.png)
#### Telecommunications Connectivity
Upgrading telecommunication networks to ensure continued trust and resilience in our digital economy.
![](https://kets-quantum.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/09/datacentreimage.png)
#### Secure Data Centre Backup
Enabling secure off-site backup for data centres to protect against critical failures and quantum adversaries.
![](https://kets-quantum.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/09/infraimage.png)
#### Securely controlling and monitoring critical infrastructure 
Upgrading the control systems in our critical infrastructure to enable the highest levels of security and safe-guard service continuity.
[Find out more](https://kets-quantum.com/quantum-key-distribution/#qkduse)
##  KETS QRNG -Use Cases
![](https://kets-quantum.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/09/pwimage.png)
## Random Password and PIN Generation
Enhancing our passwords and PINs with truly unpredictable quantum randomness.
![](https://kets-quantum.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/09/encryptimage.png)
## Seeding Encryption Algorithms
Our encryption algorithms (TLS, IPsec, MACsec, and PQC) require a quantum entropy source to seed them.
![](https://kets-quantum.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/09/statimage.png)
## Statistical Simulation
Ensuring the most accurate results in statistical simulations and optimisation methods used across a wide array of sectors.
[Find out more](https://kets-quantum.com/quantum-rng/#qrnguse)

				<div class="et_pb_module et_pb_text et_pb_text_0  et_pb_text_align_left et_pb_bg_layout_light">
				
				
				
				
				<div class="et_pb_text_inner"><p>KETS is powering the future of cybersecurity with scalable, chip-based quantum security solutions – such as Quantum Key Distribution (QKD) and Quantum Random Number Generators (QRNG).</p></div>
			</div><div class="et_pb_module et_pb_text et_pb_text_1  et_pb_text_align_left et_pb_bg_layout_light">
				
				
				
				
				<div class="et_pb_text_inner"><p><span style="font-weight: 400;">Ultra-secure, compact, and energy efficient, KETS’ range of full-system and sub-system products are built to scale – ready to protect billions of devices across defense, finance, critical infrastructure, and telecoms against emerging threats like quantum computing and AI.</span></p></div>
			</div><div class="et_pb_module dipl_button dipl_button_0">

<p></p></div></div>

							<div class="flipbox_inner"><div class="flipbox_back_content_wrapper"><div class="et_pb_flipbox_description"><p>QKD (Quantum Key Distribution) is a method for securely distributing cryptographic keys using the principles of quantum mechanics. The main advantage of QKD is that it provides a level of security that is based on the laws of physics, rather than computational complexity. This makes it an attractive solution for applications where high security is critical.</p></div><div class="et_pb_flipbox_button_back"><div class="et_pb_button_wrapper"><a class="et_pb_button" href="#">Read More</a></div></div></div>
